projectDescription: A Django-based web application for comprehensive task management with CRUD operations, Kanban/list views, CSV import/export, and built-in authentication.
keyFeatures: Full CRUD task management via web forms
Kanban board view with four status columns (Borrador, Pendiente, En proceso, Completada)
Tabular list view with multi-select and bulk actions
CSV import with duplicate detection and error handling
CSV export for individual tasks, selected tasks, or full dataset
Django built-in authentication (login/logout) with view protection via @login_required
Priority system (Low/Medium/High) with quick toggle from detail view
Inline status changes without full form submission
Pagination on list view (10 tasks per page)
Responsive Bootstrap 5 UI with custom CSS
Full-text search by task title and status filter
Django admin interface for superuser management
publicApiSurface: GET/POST /tareas/ — list and filter tasks (Kanban or list view)
GET/POST /eliminar/<id>/ — delete a task with confirmation
GET /detalle/<id>/ — view task detail with navigation
